slots.css: .sec-footer{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#09090b;color:#f5f2ea;padding:clamp(72px,9vw,150px) clamp(20px,5vw,80px) 32px}.sec-footer:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:.08;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.18) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.18) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:72px 72px;mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom,#000,transparent 86%)}.sec-footer__orb{position:absolute;right:-12vw;top:-18vw;width:min(52vw,720px);aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle at 36% 36%,rgba(255,255,255,.76),transparent 8%),radial-gradient(circle,#ff0878,#400019 58%,transparent 72%);filter:blur(.2px);opacity:.62}.sec-footer__shell{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:1480px;margin-inline:auto}.sec-footer__cta{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(280px,.42fr);gap:clamp(32px,6vw,88px);align-items:end;padding-bottom:clamp(56px,8vw,120px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(245,242,234,.18)}.sec-footer__eyebrow{margin:0 0 20px;color:var(--bs-primary,#ff0878);font:700 .76rem/1.2 ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase}.sec-footer h2{max-width:1050px;margin:0;font-size:clamp(3rem,7.5vw,8.5rem);font-weight:760;line-height:.86;letter-spacing:-.075em}.sec-footer__actions{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:18px}.sec-footer__button{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:54px;padding:0 24px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--bs-primary,#ff0878);color:#fff;text-decoration:none;font-weight:800}.sec-footer__link{color:#f5f2ea;text-underline-offset:7px}.sec-footer__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:28px;padding:clamp(36px,5vw,70px) 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(245,242,234,.16)}.sec-footer__grid div{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}.sec-footer__grid strong{font:800 .72rem/1.2 ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(245,242,234,.55)}.sec-footer__grid a,.sec-footer__grid span{color:rgba(245,242,234,.78);text-decoration:none}.sec-footer__grid a:hover{color:#fff}.sec-footer__bottom{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 2fr 1fr;gap:24px;align-items:center;padding-top:28px;color:rgba(245,242,234,.62);font-size:.92rem}.sec-footer__brand{color:#fff;text-decoration:none;font-size:clamp(1.25rem,2vw,2rem);font-weight:850;letter-spacing:-.05em}.sec-footer__bottom p{margin:0}.sec-footer__social{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}.sec-footer__social a{color:rgba(245,242,234,.68);text-decoration:none;font:700 .68rem/1 ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em}@media(max-width:900px){.sec-footer__cta,.sec-footer__bottom{grid-template-columns:1fr}.sec-footer__grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.sec-footer__social{justify-content:flex-start}}@media(max-width:560px){.sec-footer__grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.sec-footer h2{font-size:clamp(2.8rem,15vw,5rem)}}
